specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive customers used the online configuration tool before visiting dealerships in 2024?
answer: In 2024, 87% of Elexion Automotive customers used the online configuration tool to customize their ideal vehicle before visiting the dealership.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
